text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
choice_data_list:
You seem pretty tired considering you had the
day off yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...I was up all night trying to complete a jigsaw
puzzle.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I suppose that's what happens when there are a
thousand pieces...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But the final picture is supposed to be a beautiful
snowy landscape, so I was so determined to finish
it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I can't wait until it's done.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Silence Suzuka is a bit sleep deprived
after spending all night immersed in her jigsaw
puzzle.
